.github/auto_assign.yml.general_idea: Switch GitHub auto-assign configuration from assigning issues to requesting reviews.
.github/auto_assign.yml.before:
addReviewers: false
addAssignees: true
assignees:
  - uhafner
numberOfAssignees: 0
.github/auto_assign.yml.after:
addReviewers: true
addAssignees: false
reviewers:
  - uhafner
numberOfReviewers: 0

.github/dependabot.yml.general_idea: Remove the ignore rule for json-unit-assertj to allow Dependabot to update the dependency.
Add ignore rules for datatables.net-responsive and datatables.net-responsive-bs5 to prevent Dependabot from updating them beyond version 3.0.2.
.github/dependabot.yml.after:
+    ignore:
+      - dependency-name: datatables.net-responsive
+        versions:
+          - "> 3.0.2"
+      - dependency-name: datatables.net-responsive-bs5
+        versions:
+          - "> 3.0.2"

.github/workflows/check-md-links.yml.general_idea: Upgrade the GitHub Actions checkout action to version 6.
Replace the markdown link checking action with a different tool (linkspector).
Update configuration parameters to match the new link checking tool's schema.
.github/workflows/check-md-links.yml.after:
github_token: ${{ secrets.github_token }}
reporter: github-pr-check
fail_on_error: true
filter_mode: nofilter
config_file: '.github/linkspector.yml'
level: 'info'

.github/workflows/ci.yml.general_idea: Update the CI matrix to test against JDK 21 and 25, removing JDK 17 support to align with the project's minimum version requirement.
.github/workflows/ci.yml.why_exists: The project has bumped its minimum JDK version to 21; testing against JDK 17 is no longer relevant or supported.

.github/workflows/ci.yml.general_idea: Add fail-fast strategy to the CI job matrix to ensure all platform/JDK combinations run even if one fails.
Bump the GitHub Actions checkout action from version 4 to version 6.
Bump the GitHub Actions setup-java action from version 4 to version 5.
Bump the Maven version used in CI from 3.9.9 to 3.9.11.
Add CI-specific Maven profiles to the build command to optimize the CI run (e.g., skipping UI tests).

.github/workflows/enforce-labels.yml.general_idea: Change the GitHub Actions trigger from pull_request to pull_request_target to allow the workflow to run with permissions of the target repository.

.github/workflows/sync-labels.yml.general_idea: Update GitHub Actions checkout action to version 6.

.github/workflows/update-dependencies-gr.general_idea: Update GitHub Actions checkout action to the latest major version.
Update GitHub Actions setup-java action to the latest major version.
Upgrade the Java version used in the CI workflow from 21 to 25.
Update the Maven version used in the CI workflow.
Add a git pull command before committing changes to ensure the branch is up to date.
